name: Chocolate Amaretto Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shortening (Crisco butter-flavored is good, or use margarine for lower cholesterol)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a heavy saucepan, combine shortening and chocolate. Place over low heat and stir constantly until melted.
3. Remove from heat and stir in eggs and amaretto.
4. Combine flour and salt; add to the creamed mixture, stirring well.
5. Pour batter into a lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2 inches (original recipe omitted) baking pan.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and let cool.
7. For frosting: In another heavy saucepan, combine butter/margarine and chocolate. Place over low heat and stir constantly until melted.
8. Stir in half-and-half, salt, amaretto, and powdered sugar until smooth.
9. Spread frosting evenly over the cooled brownies.
10. Cut into squares. Yield: Enough frosting for 2 dozen brownies.
